name: Lindsay Coleman
subject: before the books close on 2018...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
We're nearing the end of 2018 -- which means that the end of the fundraising quarter is coming up, too.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ccc/1a8421e1/19bf02ff6/42b2ac00/2150061369/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friends, We're nearing the end of 2018 -- which means that the end of the fundraising quarter is coming up, too. We've taken a bit of a break from fundraising this month, friends, following our big victory in November. But Tom was the most vulnerable House Democrat this year and Republicans are already gearing up to challenge him in 2020, so we're running a quick end-of-year fundraising drive to get a head start. **We 've set a goal of raising $2,500 by the end of the year -- that's Monday at midnight!** [**We have just two days to reach it, so can you make a donation of any amount today?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.12.29_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks for all your support this year, friends. Team O'Halleran would be nothing without you! Thanks, Lindsay Coleman Finance Director | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.12.29_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
---

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [_clicking here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ccc/1a8421e1/19bf02ff6/42b2ac03/2150061369/VEsD/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/update-your-information").

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ccc/1a8421e1/19bf02ff6/42b2ac04/2150061369/VEsA/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633ccc/1a8421e1/19bf02ff6/42b2ac05/2150061369/VEsB/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

name: Team Walz
subject: Final Match!
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|
---

Friend:
We can't thank you enough. **We now have our moment to carve out our mark in history as One Minnesota.**
But, we're facing down a critical milestone. Our end-of-year deadline is so important that a generous group of donors has stepped up to match all contributions through midnight tomorrow. [**_Will you make a matched donation before our deadline?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/N2nKhNHOEqgPOyv5QhM14jGSlvGy3v8IFOjiqVVn-Lo=/2jOYlAT3LMRqC-kLj_EyfvUQk3l0aka3osUrByzyB5A=)
We've come so far. And we have accomplished so much. **This is one last opportunity before 2019 to say again that you believe in One Minnesota** , where everyone has the opportunity to get ahead.
Take advantage of this great opportunity before the new year. [_**Rush a MATCHED contribution right now >>**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/N2nKhNHOEqgPOyv5QhM14jGSlvGy3v8IFOjiqVVn-Lo=/2jOYlAT3LMRqC-kLj_EyfvUQk3l0aka3osUrByzyB5A=)

Thanks,
Team Walz

| ******[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/N2nKhNHOEqgPOyv5QhM14jGSlvGy3v8IFOjiqVVn-Lo=/2jOYlAT3LMRqC-kLj_EyfvUQk3l0aka3osUrByzyB5A=)******
---
|

| Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor

Mankato MN 56002 United States

name: Trevon Sylvester
subject: Your support means the world to us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Dear Peter,

With only a few days left until the end of the year, the Tennessee Democratic Party still needs your help to reach our end-of-year fundraising goal.

We still need to raise about $13,000 before midnight on December 31st.

Your support will help us continue to build the infrastructure necessary to elect Democrats in Tennessee who share our values.

Whether it’s organizing for the upcoming special elections, helping local parties succeed in all 95 counties, ensuring we can hire talented staff with the best ideas for how to win, or investing in digital advertising, your financial support truly makes the difference for what we will be able to do this year and in 2020.

Contribute $25, $50, $100 or more today to help us reach our goal and support our efforts in 2019 and beyond.

Thank you so much!

Trevon

--

Trevon Sylvester

Deputy Communications Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE |
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tennessee Democratic Party
1900 Church Street, Suite 203
Nashville TN 37203 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/HfjMFPLiCMv9edtprcEPYvbc-nVl54jQyc8Z3JyiAf8=/ao52_mNks3qZ61i79ZrfN160yOfdsLmNThoUiD6A_ss=.

body:
Just wanted to send you a quick note.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: Jason Yates
subject: Have your New Year Resolutions? Here’s mine.
body:
| | Mobilize Christians in America!

* * *
Peter, Have you made your New Year’s Resolutions yet? Resolutions are a funny thing because they are usually lofty goals, far-fetched things on your bucket list, or the “better version of the you” you’re hoping to become in the New Year. Did you know that 92 percent of Americans are doomed to fail at keeping their New Year's resolutions? Why? Mostly because the goals aren’t specific, measurable or realistic. I’ve put considerable thought into our key goals for My Faith Votes in 2019, and you play a critical role in helping us achieve them. I also know that achieving these goals is critical to our success in the next major election of 2020. Here are my resolutions for My Faith Votes in 2019:
1. **Strategically launch 100+ local My Faith Votes groups to take action in local communities and mobilize for 2020 elections**
2. **Establish a prayer team in all 435 Congressional District in the nation**
3. **Triple the size of our online presence with an emphasis on delivering video content every month countering the lies delivered through our secular culture**
4. **Equip a base of 1 million Christians for 2020 who pledge to vote and commit to work with their churches, Christian Universities, or other like-minded Christians to deploy our faith-based voting resources to bring biblical influence to elections**

These goals are all about mobilizing Christians. And these goals are based on our proven formula to see 90 million Christians put their faith into action when we Pray, Think and Act. This is what will transform our communities and our nation with Biblical truth. It requires far more than just voting every two years. The only way for true impact to be made in 2020, is for Christians to take steps NOW to engage others and advance biblical values. Whatever your 2019 goals are, would you make investing in our nation one of them? And please don’t wait. Start today. [These are the last two days to make your year-end, tax-deductible gift towards our $380,000 goal. We are in urgent need right now of covering a gap of $380,000 to do all we need to in 2019](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181230apl01nd&n=1). In 10, 20, 30 years from now, which of our resolutions will really matter? The TRULY important ones will be those that affect your faith, your family, and the legacy you leave behind, which includes the things you did to help secure America’s freedom for those who will come after us. As you think about your resolutions, please prayerfully consider including My Faith Votes. Thanks to a generous matching grant, every dollar you give to My Faith Votes BEFORE January 1st will be matched dollar for dollar. [Your donation NOW will be a critical step toward creating a better future of freedom and faith in America. No gift is too small. No one can do everything, but we can all do something. Please make your best gift today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181230apl01nd&n=2). [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181230apl01nd&n=3) Together, we will PRAY, THINK, and ACT. Most importantly, we will help millions of other Christians to do the same! I hope I can count on you to stand with us in 2019! **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181230apl01nd&n=4)
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181230apl01nd&n=5).
[ ](//www.facebook.com/myfaithvotes) [ ](//www.twitter.com/myfaithvotes) [ ](//www.instagram.com/myfaithvotes)

name: Ben Cohen
subject: Put your money toward something good this year - and I'm not talking about my ice cream
body:
The wealthy and powerful are perverting our democracy.
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a681/bed43eb/856b71f9/75fb8dbe/994301282/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
The wealthy and powerful are perverting our democracy. They scream and yell about how government is inefficient, then they use that as an excuse to slash their own taxes.
Meanwhile, they send their lobbyists to Congress and tell members that it is impossible to do anything for the common good - support Medicare for All, transition to 100% renewable energy, or make the top one percent pay their fair share in taxes. They even encourage freshman members of Congress to take their cues from corporate lobbyists.
[**Congress needs to know that they are accountable to the people. Organizations like Our Revolution and the candidates they help elect are telling the American people the truth about corporate influence and big money in our politics and working to put an end to it. Can you donate $5 before the end of the year to help continue this mission into 2019?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a681/bed43eb/856b71f9/75fb8db9/994301282/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_political_revolution?refcode=em181230-c&noskip=true")
We can pass progressive legislation no matter what the conventional wisdom tells us. Progressive elected officials, and all of you, are telling a new story - the story of a government that works for all of its people, not just the wealthy and well-established.
Medicare for All. A Green New Deal. Getting big money out of our politics. In short, a political revolution.
It's going to take millions of people getting engaged in the political process like they never have before. We need your help to organize them, turning non-voters into voters, and turning voters into organizers.
**[Will you chip in $5 to Our Revolution before the end of the year and help build on the more than 600 local groups leading the political revolution in your communities?](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a681/bed43eb/856b71f9/75fb8db9/994301282/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_political_revolution?refcode=em181230-c&noskip=true")**
I've held off on the ice cream puns until now, but you've got to admit: Political revolution sounds like a pretty sweet deal.
In solidarity,
Ben Cohen
Co-Founder, Ben & Jerry's
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a681/bed43eb/856b71f9/75fb8db9/994301282/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_political_revolution?refcode=em181230-c&noskip=true")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a681/bed43eb/856b71f9/75fb8db8/994301282/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a681/bed43eb/856b71f9/75fb8dbb/994301282/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a681/bed43eb/856b71f9/75fb8dba/994301282/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a681/bed43eb/856b71f9/75fb8da5/994301282/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: Cook Political Report says...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Tom was the most vulnerable Democrat in the House in 2018. And Republicans will try to unseat him again soon.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633cd1/1a8421e1/19befb005/42da06a7/534004992/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friends, Tom was the most vulnerable Democrat in the House in 2018. And Republicans will try to unseat him again soon. That's according to the nonpartisan elections forecasters over at _Cook Political Report_ , which just released its House race ratings for the 2020 election. _Cook Political_ ranks AZ-01 as competitive and a likely Republican target! We need to get ready for the fight ahead -- _and that starts by meeting our end-of-year fundraising goal tomorrow at midnight._ **[Can you chip in right now to keep AZ-01 blue in 2020?](http://action.tomohalleran. clean_body: Tom was the most vulnerable Democrat in the House in 2018. And Republicans will try to unseat him again soon. Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first. "" Friends, Tom was the most vulnerable Democrat in the House in 2018. And Republicans will try to unseat him again soon. That's according to the nonpartisan elections forecasters over at Cook Political Report , which just released its House race ratings for the 2020 election. Cook Political ranks AZ-01 as competitive and a likely Republican target! We need to get ready for the fight ahead -- and that starts by meeting our end-of-year fundraising goal tomorrow at midnight. name: Mary Mancini
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Dear Peter,

I’ll keep this brief:

We still need to raise $10,000 before tomorrow night at midnight in order to meet our end-of-year fundraising goal for 2018.

Your contribution will help us:

Start even earlier in recruiting candidates to run for office

Fight back against harmful legislation from Republicans at the Capitol

Organize early in all 95 counties to ensure we have the infrastructure to win in 2019, 2020, and beyond

We can’t do this without you. Give $50, $100, or $250 right now and help us start the new year on the right foot.

Thank you for your support!

Mary

--

Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE |
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tennessee Democratic Party
1900 Church Street, Suite 203
Nashville TN 37203 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/VsnjyCFAQO4g1AkZFo430LBFnwokn0roFT4mnXmlpIU=/LughsK7RblWkolB-TWVfpz8Ssl_SH3jnKNe1ntiatgw=.
